name: Name
verify_notoken_desc: Oops! We are unable to verify your account.
verify_inprocess_desc: Please wait a second while we're working hard!
verify_succ_desc: Congrats! You can now access JackRabbit to start your e-signing task.
verify_fail_desc:
Oops! We are unable to verify your account. Please check if you have verified before.

If you have not verified before, please send an email for verification to our customer support: appservice@jackrabbit.com.
blank_waiting_for_me: Documents for you to sign will be displayed here.
blank_waiting_for_others: Documents waiting for others to complete signing will be displayed here.
blank_profile: Profile are not set currently. Please edit your profile under 'Settings' page.
blank_template: No templates available currently, please go to the Settings to create a new one.
blank_reissue_for_me: Documents for you to rollback will be displayed here.
error_desc:
Sorry, we couldn't find the page you were looking for.
We suggest that you return to the home page.
tooltip_auto_reminder: Recipients will receive automatic reminders if they have not finished signing in 2 days and will get another one after 6 days if the document is still not signed.
tooltip_expiration: Send an expiry reminder email to inform the recipient the signing task is about to expire.
tooltip_otp_email: You will receive a one-time password in your email or mobile message to authenticate your identity to sign a document.
tooltip_otp_email_create: You can require signers to authenticate their identities with one-time passwords that will be sent to their emails or SMS to continue signing.
tooltip_template_downgrade: Template Invalid. Please update to use
tooltip_receiver_lang: Default language of the notification mail to signers can be set here.
tooltip_pricing_advanced_signing_fields: Radio button and checkbox. Field property setting, including making it optional or not and designating filled-in date in specific time period.
tooltip_pricing_admin_branding: Add company name and logo to enhance your clients' impression towards your company
tooltip_pricing_admin_password_sms: One-time password for signer identity authentication. Can also be sent via email, free for all plans.
tooltip_cc: CC recipients will receive an email notification when the signing task starts. After all signers finish signing, CC recipients will receive a notification with the completed PDF file via email.
tooltip_default_value: You can add a default value to the field, and the signer will see the value you have pre-filled.
tooltip_placeholder: You can use “Placeholder” to give the signer a hint about what to fill in.
tooltip_font_size: When the font size is fixed, the signer will not be able to change the font size of the field.
tooltip_alignment: When the alignment is fixed, the signer will not be able to change the alignment of the field.
tooltip_mobile_sign_panel: You can drawing signature on a mobile device through scanning the QR Code.
tooltip_verify_timing: You can request the signers to authenticate their identities at a specified time.
tooltip_background_removal_threshold: When the tolerance value is larger, more areas with colors similar to the background will be removed.
tooltip_eraser_restore_mode: This mode allows you to restore the previously cleared region using the eraser tool.
tooltip_review: Before proceeding to the next stage, this stage need to be checked as soon as the signer finish signing.
tooltip_email_per_request: The OTP SMS verification is required. Please provide the new signer’s phone number.
tooltip_public_form_terminated: When the content of the template changes, the public form will be terminated.
tooltip_signing_group: You can import the pre-established group of signers with their signing order to the task, making the process more efficient.
settings_otp_sender: Only when sender asks: receive via Email
settings_otp_both_hint: Always: receive via both Email and SMS (Subscription required)
settings_otp_both: Always: receive via both Email and SMS
tips_settings_account: To ensure the authenticity, account email is not allowed to be altered.
tips_settings_profile: Each profile item can be used individually while signing document.
tips_settings_signature: Signatures can be used directly while signing document.
tips_settings_label: Labels are used in task or template categorization. Manage your tasks or templates in a neat way now!
tips_settings_signing_group: You can group the commonly used signing process and create a Signer Group. Import it when creating the task to make the process efficient.
tips_settings_template: Import a reusable template to save time creating a task.
tips_settings_protected_task: Enable blockchain to enhance your documents' security and integrity. Turning on this feature will not affect your personal information and privacy since all your documents are under JackRabbit's protection and will not be shared with the blockchain provider.
tips_admin_tasks: Tasks are counted only when user join the group. (User can only join one team at a time).
tips_admin_decline_reasons: This is the decline reasons for the group.
tips_developer_decline_reasons: This is the decline reasons by the system.
tips_bulk_send: When you create signing task from Templates, you can send up to 100 requests at one time by using Bulk Send feature.
tips_review_failed: Upon return, the signature field will be cleared. The signer must re-sign.
tips_template_replace_file_info: The replacement document must have the same dimensions as the original document and contain no fewer pages than the original. Please confirm the page count and dimensions are correct before proceeding with the change.
tips_public_forms: With Public Form, you can create a self-service document for signature. A Public Form is initiated from a unique, secure URL that you make available for signers to complete.
tips_template_limit_reached: You've reached the limit of current plan:
tips_template_limit_exceeded: You've exceeded the limit of current plan:
tips_template_exceeded_hint: To continue, please delete the templates created or Upgrade.
textfield_error_validate:
Incorrect data format.
Please follow the required format.
link_error_validate: Invalid Link. Please enter a URL starting with http(s)://.
hint_date_restrict: The sender has restricted this date to:
google_contact_search_placeholder: enter name or email to search
error_pdf_title: Unable to load the PDF file
error_pdf_loaded_fal:
Possibly the browser version is out of date nor the file structure is not supported.

If you constantly encouter the problem, try download the app.
